compiled_state.title: GREEN: add --review-tier flag to write-reviewer-findings.sh with enum validation
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## TDD Requirement
Make RED tests from task 417b-edce pass.

## Implementation
- Add --review-tier <tier> flag parsing to write-reviewer-findings.sh
- Validate value against enum: light|standard|deep (case-sensitive, lowercase only)
- On invalid value: exit non-zero with error message to stderr
- Write review_tier field to the JSON output object
- When --review-tier is omitted: do not include review_tier field (graceful absence)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier light produces JSON with review_tier field
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier light ... | python3 -c "import json,sys; assert json.load(sys.stdin)['review_tier']=='light'"
- [ ] write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier invalid exits non-zero
  Verify: ! bash plugins/dso/scripts/write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier invalid 2>/dev/null

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 3 acceptance criteria verified: tests pass (23/23), --review-tier light writes review_tier field, --review-tier invalid exits non-zero
comments.author: Main

comments.body: Fixed: --review-tier flag implemented in write-reviewer-findings.sh, all 23 tests GREEN.
comments.author: Main
